# just Results Consulting

> Strategy, change management, and technology advisory delivered as one practice. Four decades bridging boards and shop floors, with equal depth in process/energy and discrete manufacturing — a rare pairing on the same desk.

just Results Consulting a.s is a Norwegian advisory firm founded by Leif Næss (MBA, PhD, MSc). The practice serves industrial clients, educational institutions, and government organizations across Norway, Europe, and worldwide.

## Practice areas

- **Strategy** — corporate strategy facilitation, positioning, and execution
- **Change management** — large-scale organizational change, corporate turnarounds, merger integration
- **Technology** — technology-driven innovation, lean manufacturing implementation

Every engagement begins with a diagnosis, not a deck. We sit with the board and the shop floor in equal measure, map where intent meets constraint, and then propose the smallest change that moves the result. Most mandates run eight to twenty weeks and leave the organisation able to make the next decision without us.

## Sectors

- Process industry
- Energy
- Discrete manufacturing
- Academic and public-sector clients

## Contact

- Email: leif.naess@justresults.no
- Web: https://justresults.no/

## About the founder

Leif Næss is founder and CEO of just Results Consulting. He holds an MBA, a PhD, and an MSc, and has spent forty years advising boards and shop floors across global industrial, academic, and public sectors. His work spans corporate turnarounds, merger integrations, lean manufacturing implementation, and national cluster development initiatives.
